date.description: The blocked date in YYYY-MM-DD format

start_time.description: Start time in HH:MM format (optional - if not provided, blocks entire day)

end_time.description: End time in HH:MM format (optional - if not provided, blocks entire day)

block_type.description: Type of block - full day, partial day, or exception to regular availability

reason.description: Optional reason for blocking (vacation, personal, etc.)

external_calendar_event_id.description: ID from external calendar system (Google Calendar, etc.)
